title: ophrys × cornelli
intro: Ophrys × cornelli, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and is a cross between Ophrys cornuta and Ophrys insectifera. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × cornelli include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its flowers can be used to make a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
